description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of JavaScript's advanced features such as interfaces (via TypeScript or JSDoc), Symbol usage, and property enumerability. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, using a casual, encouraging tone to motivate learners to demonstrate their skills.
Topics: JavaScript interfaces (TypeScript/JSDoc), Symbol primitive and Symbol.iterator, Object property enumerability, Prototype chain and property descriptors, ES6+ language features
Audience: Developers with basic JavaScript experience who want to test and deepen their understanding of modern language constructs.
